title: M1: Deterministic Platform Core
description: Build-order coverage: #1 session models, #2 knowledge graph, #3 routing, harness scaffold.

title: M2: Arc Engine + Nightcap Arc + Safety
description: Nightcap runs all three beats in the harness; killer is assigned; reveal fires; AI dialogue never leaks knowledge state; L1 hard stops and L2 classification fire before generation.

title: M3: Events, API, Persistence, Telemetry
description: A full session runs through the API; event routing respects target audience boundaries; interrupt and resume restore to the nearest beat; all five telemetry signals log; a 10-run API harness passes.

title: M4: Nightcap Experience Layer
description: Real humans can play end-to-end on real devices; join flow takes under 30 seconds; private information never appears on the shared display.

title: M5: Hardening + Proof Prerequisites
description: Adversarial safety playtest is complete and blocking issues are resolved; per-session gross margin is known at each player count; a second arc schema exists; all four Visual Storyworld Phase 1 inspection surfaces are live.

title: M6: First Qualifying Sessions
description: Five or more completed sessions with outside groups; unprompted replay enthusiasm; personalization perception in at least two sessions; initial proof runs at 4 to 6 players.
